description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Les Paul shape. The body features a distinctive camouflage pattern in shades of green, beige, and brown, with a floral motif near the upper bout. The guitar has a dark-colored neck and headstock, with metallic tuning pegs and a visible bridge and pickup configuration. The back of the guitar continues the camouflage pattern and includes a black electronics cover plate. The instrument appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with metal hardware and plastic components for the pickguard and control knobs. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, giving the guitar a modern and eye-catching appearance.
description: A camouflage-patterned, single-cutaway electric guitar with floral detailing, metallic hardware, and a smooth, glossy finish. The design is visually striking and modern, with a classic Les Paul-inspired shape.
description_view_0: The front view shows the camouflage and floral pattern, pickups, bridge, control knobs, and the full neck and headstock.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the guitar's thickness and the profile of the body and neck, with tuning pegs visible at the headstock.
description_view_2: The back view displays the camouflage pattern continuing across the rear, along with a black electronics cover plate.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the body depth and edge contours, with the neck and headstock profile visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, classic Les Paul-style shape
